attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.OTM_CUSTOMER_ID, TRANSLATE(STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.NAME USING UNICODE_TO_LATIN WITH ERROR) NAME, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.COUNTRY, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.CITY, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.STATE, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.CR_PARTY_ID, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.CR_PARTY_ID_SOURCE, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.REGION, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.COUNTY, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.POSTAL_CODE, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.ADDRESS1, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.ADDRESS2, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.ADDRESS3, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.OTM_BATCH_ID, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.CREATION_DATE, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.CREATED_BY, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.REFRESH_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES,
 (
 select OTM_CUSTOMER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES
 minus
 select OTM_CUSTOMER_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.OTM_CUSTOMER_ID = STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.OTM_CUSTOMER_ID  and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.G2C_XXOTM_PHX_PARTIES)
